packageRules.description: Automerge non-major dev/tooling updates — but only after the CI trust gates pass (ADR-0016 Decision 6). Renovate waits for the required status checks from ci.yml; make those checks required in branch protection for this to be a real gate. Bot pushes should use the portfolio PAT (not GITHUB_TOKEN) so downstream CI retriggers (ADR-0006).
Never automerge majors — contract/behaviour risk needs a human.
React stays on the peer-supported range; group its updates.
